long_description:
#cm-dashboard_outage_12-8-25 create incident

Dashboard is missing data https://opsdashboard.w3.cloud.ibm.com/graphs/d/SDgTdp6rr/vpc-capacity-review?var-interval=1h&var-interval2=1d&orgId=1&from=2025-12-08T02:30:00.000Z&to=2025-12-08T03:30:00.000Z&timezone=browser&var-DCmysql=DAL10&var-geo=$__all&var-region=$__all&var-mzone=$__all&var-zone=$__all&var-DC=$__all&var-Hw_Type=$__all&var-Hw_Gen=Gen3&var-HW_Class=bx3d&var-HW_Class=bx3d-elba&var-HW_Classmysql=$__all&var-yyyymmdd_mysql=20251208&var-yyyymmddhhmmss_mysql=20251208032502&var-fileextn_mysql=%2F20251208%2Fvpc-capacity-report-v1_Allocations-v2_20251208032502000000.parquet&var-yyyymmdd_cos=20251208&var-fileextn_cos=%2F20251208%2Fvpc-capacity-report-v1_Allocations-v2_20251208032502000000.parquet&var-fileextn_input=%2F20251208%2Fvpc-capacity-report-v1_Allocations-v2_20251208032502000000.parquet in various regions SAO, LON, TOR, SYD, OSA
Incident source: #cm-dashboard_outage_12-8-25 - Greg Westmoreland
close_notes:
Issue Summary: The VPC Operations Dashboard is not showing data for several regions, including CHE, LON, OSA, MON, SAO, and SYD. The issue is related to a certificate access problem, and the team is investigating the cause.
SME Findings: The SMEs have found that the issue is not related to the compute workspace, and they are investigating the possibility of a change or incident that caused the problem.
Reason of Escalation: The issue was escalated because the dashboard is not showing data, and the team needs to resolve the issue as soon as possible.
Resolution Steps: Rolling back the odz-image-version from 1.78.0 to 1.77.0 is resolving the issue. A few regions are still pending rollback. As there are no pending actions from the CORE team,closed the incident and updating it towards Jira: ODS-7610.
Signature of Issue: The signature of the issue is a certificate access problem that is preventing the VPC Operations Dashboard from showing data.
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: The following tickets are related to the issue:
ODS-7610 (investigation ticket)
CHG14156922 (change ticket)
CHG14200501 (change ticket)
Category/Subcategory: is-vpc Capacity issue Out of capacity 
Timeline Summary: The issue started on Friday, December 5th, and the team is still investigating the cause. The timeline of events is as follows:
Friday, December 5th: The issue started, and the team began investigating.
Saturday, December 6th: The team continued investigating and found that the issue was related to a certificate access problem.
Sunday, December 7th: The team continued investigating and found that the issue was not related to the compute workspace.
Monday, December 8th: The team is still investigating and taking steps to resolve the issue.
Tuesday, December 9th: Rollingback odz-image-version from 1.78.0 to 1.77.0
PR - https://github.ibm.com/nextgen-environments/global-env/pull/1891
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed
Caused by Change/Incident: The issue was caused by a change CHG14200501 
Warroom: The warroom for this issue is #warroom-vpc-inc10505654.
Meeting URL: 
Outage Start: 
Outage End:
